author: jinmugo
description: A workspace toolkit to build focused, clutter-free zones for every task. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jinmu Go
manifest.description: A workspace toolkit to build focused, clutter-free zones for every task.
manifest.name: Context Workspaces

name: Context Workspaces

releases.author: JinmuGo
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Fixes
- Default emoji picker locale to English (#14) — the emoji picker previously rendered its search box and category labels in Korean regardless of the user's system language.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JinmuGo/obsidian-context-workspaces/compare/0.1.5...0.1.6

releases.author: JinmuGo
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Features
- Add status bar space switcher (#12)
- Add "Activate on startup" setting for the sidebar tab (#11)
- Add settings button to the sidebar view header (#10)

### Fixes
- Make the settings button actually visible in the sidebar (#13)
- Prevent emoji picker "Illegal constructor" crash on plugin reload (#9)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JinmuGo/obsidian-context-workspaces/compare/0.1.4...0.1.5

releases.author: JinmuGo
releases.description:
## Changes

Follow-up to the Obsidian community plugin review.

**API compatibility**
- `workspace.revealLeaf()` is awaited (it returns `Promise<void>` since Obsidian 1.7.2), so `minAppVersion` is raised `0.15.0` → `1.7.2` to match. Clears `obsidianmd/no-unsupported-api`.

**Timers**
- All 37 timer calls switched from `activeWindow.*` to `window.*` (`setTimeout` / `clearTimeout` / `setInterval` / `clearInterval`), per the linter's `window`-timer guidance.

**CSS lint**
- Dropped the standard `scrollbar-width` / `scrollbar-color` declarations (only partially supported in older Obsidian). The existing `::-webkit-scrollbar` rules already provide identical styling, so there is no visual change.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JinmuGo/obsidian-context-workspaces/compare/0.1.3...0.1.4

releases.author: JinmuGo
releases.description:
## Changes

Addresses all items from the Obsidian community plugin review.

**Suspicious behavior (`setInterval` + network)**
- Removed telemetry entirely — this was the plugin's only network call, so the periodic background transmission and the bundled API key no longer ship.

**Popout-window compatibility**
- `setTimeout` / `setInterval` / `clearTimeout` / `clearInterval` → `activeWindow.*`, `document` → `activeDocument`
- `document.createElement('div')` → `createDiv()`, `instanceof HTMLElement` → `.instanceOf(HTMLElement)`
- `builtin-modules` → `node:module`'s `builtinModules`; removed unused `eslint-plugin-react`

**Dependencies**
- Dropped `vibe-tools` (dev tool, source of most transitive CVEs) and `swiper` (unused shipping dep). `pnpm audit --prod` is now clean.

**CSS lint**
- Removed all 83 `!important` declarations with the effective cascade preserved, and consolidated ~20 duplicate selectors.

**Release**
- Added build provenance attestation (`actions/attest-build-provenance`) for `main.js` and `styles.css`.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JinmuGo/obsidian-context-workspaces/compare/0.1.2...0.1.3

releases.author: JinmuGo
releases.description:
## Changes
- Improve type safety by adding Obsidian internal API type definitions
- Replace `@ts-expect-error` comments with typed `asInternal()` helper
- Upgrade ESLint to `recommendedTypeChecked` rules
- Add unit tests for performance-monitor and validation utilities
- Fix async/await usage and type assertions
